events.text: Diagnosis written to `/app/answer.json`: the twisted brake hose is treated as an installation defect (fitting torqued without holding the hose against rotation), which pre-stresses the hose braid and risks flow restriction or chafing-induced failure — result is a **fail** at **high risk**, with replacement/re-indexing and full-travel clearance check as the corrective actions.
